content: [{"section_id": "s01", "title": "Intermittent Fasting Protocols and Metabolic Syndrome Definitions", "description": "Characterizes the family of IF protocols (TRE, ADF, 5:2, FMD) and reviews the harmonized definition of metabolic syndrome as context."}, {"section_id": "s02", "title": "Pooled Efficacy on Cardiometabolic Endpoints", "description": "Synthesizes meta-analytic effect sizes on FBG, HbA1c, HOMA-IR, lipid profile, body weight, BMI, and blood pressure in metabolic-syndrome populations."}, {"section_id": "s03", "title": "Methodological Heterogeneity and GRADE Certainty", "description": "Examines sources of heterogeneity, publication bias, risk of bias, and the GRADE certainty levels assigned to key endpoints."}, {"section_id": "s04", "title": "Long-Term Safety and Observational Evidence", "description": "Addresses long-term cardiovascular safety, contrasting RCT outcomes with observational cohort and free-living evidence."}, {"section_id": "s05", "title": "Biological Mechanisms and Pathways", "description": "Covers circadian alignment, autophagy/mTOR, gut-immune signaling, and adipose remodeling as candidate mechanisms."}, {"section_id": "s06", "title": "Clinical Implications and Research Priorities", "description": "Translates evidence into patient-selection guidance and identifies remaining research gaps."}]
